label: Molotov
worldEffect: A fuel-filled bottle with a cloth wick — a bottle of fire, and it's very loud when it goes.
description: Blueprint-gated (a police/station find). Cheap to make, expensive to use — the loudness is the item's cost when thrown, not the craft's. SCR-10's amber 'MISSING PART' row when fuel is short.
notes: worldEffect describes the made object; the thrown-weapon effect lands with the combat throw system (deferred, PL).
